brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of O*NET Related Work Experience (RW scale, element_id='3.A.1') from bronze.onet_experience into base.onet_experience_profiles. Filters Bronze to RW rows, computes a weighted-median category per O*NET-SOC using data_value as the weight, maps the median category to a years midpoint per spec §Zone 2 table (Category 1=0.0, 2=0.25, 3=0.75, 4=1.5, 5=3.0, 6=5.0, 7=7.0, 8=9.0, 9=10.0, 10=11.0, 11=12.0 for 'Over 10 years' — midpoints approved 2026-04-16, see governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md), derives tier via approved thresholds (0–1=entry, 1–4=early, 4–8=mid, 8+=senior), truncates O*NET-SOC (XX-XXXX.XX) to BLS SOC (XX-XXXX), and averages experience_years_typical across any multi-detail codes with onet_details_averaged exposing the fan-in count for provenance. LEFT JOIN to base.onet_occupations is informational (currently empty) — all 765 rows originate from bronze.onet_experience. experience_distribution preserves full per-category frequencies as JSON. suppress_flag is OR-aggregated across contributing Bronze rows. record_id computed via compute_grain_id(row, ['bls_soc_code'], prefix='exp').

documentation.description: Normalize and model O*NET Related Work Experience data into base.onet_experience_profiles at bls_soc_code grain. Step 1: filter Bronze to scale_id='RW' (element_id='3.A.1'). Step 2: per O*NET-SOC, compute weighted median category by accumulating data_value (percent frequency) until cumulative >= 50%; ties broken by preferring the lower category. Step 3: map median category to experience_years_typical via spec §Zone 2 midpoint table (Category 1=0.0, 2=0.25, 3=0.75, 4=1.5, 5=3.0, 6=5.0, 7=7.0, 8=9.0, 9=10.0, 10=11.0, 11=12.0 — 'Over 10 years' midpoint approved at 12, not 15). Step 4: derive experience_tier from years (0–1 entry, 1–4 early, 4–8 mid, 8+ senior — thresholds approved 2026-04-16). Step 5: truncate O*NET-SOC XX-XXXX.XX to BLS SOC XX-XXXX; for multi-detail SOC codes, take unweighted mean of experience_years_typical across details; onet_details_averaged records the count. Step 6: preserve full per-category frequency distribution as JSON in experience_distribution; OR-aggregate recommend_suppress='Y' into suppress_flag; compute record_id via compute_grain_id(row, ['bls_soc_code'], prefix='exp').

inputFilter.description: Silver consumes only Related Work Experience rows; other ETE scales (RL, PT, OJ) remain in Bronze but are not materialized in base.

joinRole.description: Informational LEFT JOIN for occupation metadata enrichment. Table may be empty at transform time — the LEFT JOIN guarantees all bronze.onet_experience rows are preserved regardless of occupation lookup coverage. All 765 output rows derive from bronze.onet_experience; base.onet_occupations contributes no field values in the current run.

assertions.description: Rows written to base.onet_experience_profiles Iceberg table. Matches expected P0 range 720 ≤ count ≤ 810 (~765 per EDA 2026-04-16).
distinct_bls_soc = 765 = row count — grain uniqueness upheld (one row per BLS-level SOC).
Iceberg snapshot committed for this transform run.

transformationDescription.description: Weighted-median aggregation with midpoint mapping and tier derivation per spec §Zone 2 and governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md. For each O*NET-SOC code in the RW-filtered Bronze slice, accumulate percent-frequency weights (data_value) over ordered categories 1..11 until cumulative >= 50% — that category is the weighted median. Map median category to years via approved midpoint table (Cat 1=0.0, 2=0.25, 3=0.75, 4=1.5, 5=3.0, 6=5.0, 7=7.0, 8=9.0, 9=10.0, 10=11.0, 11=12.0 — 'Over 10 years' pinned at 12 per A5 approval). Derive experience_tier from years via approved thresholds 0–1=entry, 1–4=early, 4–8=mid, 8+=senior (A4 approval). Truncate O*NET-SOC XX-XXXX.XX → BLS SOC XX-XXXX; for SOC codes with multiple O*NET details (e.g., 15-1252.00 + 15-1252.01), take unweighted mean of experience_years_typical and surface detail count in onet_details_averaged (A6 approval). Preserve per-category frequencies as JSON in experience_distribution to allow downstream weighted-median recomputation. OR-aggregate recommend_suppress='Y' across contributing Bronze rows into suppress_flag.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash computed via compute_grain_id(row, ['bls_soc_code'], prefix='exp'). Input is the truncated BLS SOC (derived from Bronze onet_soc_code).

bls_soc_code.transformationDescription: Truncate O*NET-SOC XX-XXXX.XX to BLS-level SOC XX-XXXX by dropping the detail suffix. Multi-detail O*NET codes collapse to a single BLS row (see onet_details_averaged).

experience_category_median.transformationDescription: Weighted median category (1-11). For each O*NET-SOC code filtered to scale_id='RW' AND element_id='3.A.1', accumulate data_value as a weight across ordered categories 1..11 until cumulative frequency crosses 50%. Ties broken by preferring the lower category. Spec §Test Matrix enumerates edge cases (all-zero frequency, single-category 100%, tie at 50%).

experience_years_typical.transformationDescription: Midpoint years for the weighted median category per spec §Zone 2 midpoint table (Cat 1=0.0, 2=0.25, 3=0.75, 4=1.5, 5=3.0, 6=5.0, 7=7.0, 8=9.0, 9=10.0, 10=11.0, 11=12.0). 'Over 10 years' midpoint approved at 12 (not 15) — governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md A5. For BLS SOCs with multiple O*NET details, take unweighted mean of per-detail years.

experience_tier.transformationDescription: Derived from experience_years_typical via approved thresholds (governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md A4): 0 ≤ years < 1 → 'entry'; 1 ≤ years < 4 → 'early'; 4 ≤ years < 8 → 'mid'; years ≥ 8 → 'senior'. Spot-checked: 11-1011 (Chief Executives) → 'senior' (cat 11, years 12); 15-1252 (Software Developers) → 'mid' (cat 9, years 7); 41-2031 (Retail Salespersons) → 'entry' (cat 5, years 0.75 — bimodal RW distribution).

experience_category_mode.transformationDescription: Most common category per O*NET-SOC — argmax over data_value across categories 1..11 in the RW-filtered rows. Unlike the median, this is computed on each O*NET-SOC before BLS collapse; for multi-detail BLS codes, the mode is carried from the first detail (informational only, not a grain key).

experience_distribution.transformationDescription: JSON-serialized object preserving full per-category frequencies (e.g., '{"1": 5.2, "7": 45.3, ...}') from every contributing O*NET detail so downstream analysts can recompute weighted median with alternative midpoints if ever needed (governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md A6 rationale).

onet_details_averaged.transformationDescription: Count of distinct O*NET-SOC detail codes (XX-XXXX.XX) aggregated into this single BLS-SOC row. 1 for simple codes; >1 for multi-detail collapses (e.g., 15-1252.00 + 15-1252.01 → onet_details_averaged=2). Provenance for the unweighted-mean step on experience_years_typical.

suppress_flag.transformationDescription: Boolean OR-aggregation: True if recommend_suppress = 'Y' in ANY contributing Bronze row for this BLS-SOC (across categories and across O*NET details within the SOC). Downstream consumers may filter suppress_flag=TRUE rows for higher-confidence slices.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Carried forward from Bronze load_date (UTC date of the Bronze ingest run). Preserves provenance across the Silver transform.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-generated UTC timestamp at time of Silver promotion. Added by the transformer, not from source data.
